[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000110101 4
1 000001110 3
2 011110011 6
3 000110001 3
4 101000101 4
5 111011101 7
6 101000111 5
7 011111011 7

01 011111011 7 match 7

67 111111111 a
70 101100111 6
